title: Business Development Manager (R1)
description:
Responsibilities:

•Conduct outbound prospecting activities, including cold calling, email outreach, and social selling, to identify and qualify leads.

•Research target accounts and decision-makers to understand their needs, pain points, and buying process.

•Articulate our value proposition clearly and persuasively to prospects, highlighting how our solutions can address their challenges and deliver tangible results.

•Collaborate closely with the sales team to schedule meetings and demos with qualified prospects, ensuring a smooth handoff of leads.

•Keep accurate records of prospect interactions and update our CRM system with relevant information.

•Continuously strive to meet and exceed monthly/quarterly revenue and margin targets.

•Interact with and further enhance the excellent relationship and teamwork with other departments within the company.

Requirements:

•Candidate must possess 2-3 years of sales hunting role.

•Minimum of a Diploma in any related field.

•Strong negotiation skills and experience in acquiring new customers.

•Excellent communication skills, with the ability to build and maintain relationships with internal and external stakeholders.

•Strategic thinking and problem-solving abilities focus on driving results and delivering value.

•Knowledge of logistics, e-Commerce and social media live steam is a plus point.

•Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a fast-paced environment.

•Proficiency in Microsoft Office suite; experience with logistics management software is a plus.

postedCompany.description:
ECMS Express is a technology-driven international logistics company established in 2013. Over the years, we have leveraged our mature experience in international logistics services and competitive market rates to offer a comprehensive international cross-border logistics solution. Our products include end-to-end international air express, international freight forwarding, contract logistics and other customer-focus value-added services. ECMS Express’s service network covers the world's leading trade markets. It has an established presence in mainland China, Hong Kong, Singapore, the United States, the United Kingdom, Europe, South Korea & Japan.


Equipped with an in-house proprietary intelligent logistics system and integrated customs systems, ECMS Express can offer a customer-focus customised solution, including customised IT integration to manage and implement a total supply chain solution that is designed according to the business and IT requirements.
postedCompany.name: ECMS EXPRESS (S) PTE. LTD.
